title: Header component with breadcrumbs and action buttons
purpose: Displays a page header with title, optional breadcrumbs, and action buttons for the Codex dashboard.
module_context: Exports a Header component that accepts title, subtitle, breadcrumbs, actions, and className props. Defines BreadcrumbItem and HeaderProps interfaces for type safety.

steps.content: Render the header element with default styling and optional custom class name.
IF breadcrumbs are provided and not empty, render the breadcrumb navigation.
For each breadcrumb item, render a navigation link or static text based on its position and href property.
Render the page title within a heading element.
IF a subtitle is provided, render it below the title.
IF action buttons are provided, render them in a flex container.
